company.name: BluArc, LLC
company.tagline: Independent app development for focused, useful software.
company.description: BluArc, LLC designs and maintains simple, reliable apps across Apple and mobile platforms. Our work is built to be clear, respectful of privacy, and easy to support.
company.supportMessage: For app support, privacy questions, or account-related requests, contact us by email and include the app name in your message.

apps.name: AutoAtlas
apps.description: A vehicle maintenance and document vault app.
apps.longDescription: AutoAtlas helps vehicle owners track maintenance, reminders, receipts, warranties, registration records, insurance records, photos, notes, documents, costs, and resale/export reports in an offline-first app.

privacy.informationCollected:
AutoAtlas lets you store information about your vehicles, including vehicle details, mileage, maintenance records, reminders, receipts, warranties, registration records, insurance records, photos, notes, documents, costs, and resale/export reports.

This information is created and controlled by you. AutoAtlas does not require an account with BluArc LLC, and we do not operate a required backend server for your private vehicle records.

If you contact us for support, feedback, or business questions, we may receive information you choose to provide, such as your name, email address, screenshots, device details, or a description of the issue.
privacy.howInformationIsUsed:
AutoAtlas is designed to work fully offline. By default, your AutoAtlas data is stored locally on your device using Apple's on-device storage technologies. We do not receive, view, sell, or share the vehicle records you save locally in the app.

Information you add is used by the app to provide vehicle maintenance tracking, reminders, document storage, cost history, reports, and export features. Support communications are used to respond to you, troubleshoot issues, improve AutoAtlas, and maintain business records.

Please do not send sensitive vehicle documents, insurance cards, financial documents, or personally sensitive files by email unless necessary for support.
privacy.thirdPartyServices:
AutoAtlas may use Apple platform services, including App Store purchases, iCloud, CloudKit, device backup, notifications, photo library access, document picker, and other Apple device features.

Premium and Pro users may use iCloud backup and sync where available. When iCloud sync is enabled, AutoAtlas uses Apple's iCloud and CloudKit services to store and sync your AutoAtlas data through your private Apple iCloud account. iCloud data is handled by Apple under Apple's terms and privacy practices, and synced data may count against your personal iCloud storage.

We may also use service providers that help us operate our website, support inbox, business records, or customer communications.
privacy.adsAnalyticsDisclosure:
AutoAtlas is not designed to track you across apps or websites. AutoAtlas does not sell your personal information and does not use your vehicle records for advertising.

If we add analytics, crash reporting, advertising, or third-party SDKs in the future, we will update this Privacy Policy and the App Store privacy disclosures as required before or when those features are released.
privacy.childrensPrivacy: AutoAtlas is intended for vehicle owners and is not directed to children under 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13. If you believe a child has provided information to us, contact us and we will take appropriate steps.
privacy.updates: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. If we make material changes, we will update the Last updated date and, when appropriate, provide additional notice in the app or on our website.

additionalSections.title: Local Storage
additionalSections.content:
By default, your AutoAtlas data is stored locally on your device using Apple's on-device storage technologies. We do not receive, view, sell, or share the vehicle records you save locally in the app.

If you delete the app, reset your device, or erase app data, locally stored records may be deleted unless they have been backed up by Apple device backup services or synced through iCloud where available.

additionalSections.title: iCloud Sync
additionalSections.content:
Premium and Pro users may use iCloud backup and sync where available. When iCloud sync is enabled, AutoAtlas uses Apple's iCloud and CloudKit services to store and sync your AutoAtlas data through your private Apple iCloud account.

iCloud data is handled by Apple under Apple's terms and privacy practices. AutoAtlas does not operate its own server for this synced data. Synced data may count against your personal iCloud storage.

You can manage iCloud availability through your Apple ID, iCloud settings, device settings, and app settings.

additionalSections.title: Photos, Documents, and Attachments
additionalSections.content:
AutoAtlas may ask for access to your photo library or document picker when you choose to attach a photo, receipt, PDF, warranty, registration, insurance card, or other file to a record. AutoAtlas only uses the files or photos you choose to add.

Attachments are stored locally on your device unless iCloud sync is enabled for the app and your plan supports it.

additionalSections.title: Notifications
additionalSections.content:
AutoAtlas may ask for notification permission if you choose to use reminders. Notifications are used for vehicle-related reminders such as oil changes, tire rotations, registration renewals, insurance renewals, inspections, and other reminders you create.

You can change notification permissions at any time in iOS Settings.

additionalSections.title: Purchases and Subscriptions
additionalSections.content:
If AutoAtlas offers paid plans, purchases and subscriptions are processed by Apple through the App Store. We do not receive your full payment card number or billing credentials. Apple may provide us with limited subscription status information needed to unlock app features.

You can manage or cancel App Store subscriptions through your Apple ID subscription settings.

additionalSections.title: Data Sharing
additionalSections.content:
We do not sell your AutoAtlas vehicle records.

We may share information only in limited situations:

- With Apple, when you use App Store purchases, iCloud, CloudKit, device backup, notifications, or other Apple platform services.
- With service providers that help us operate our website, support inbox, business records, or customer communications.
- If required by law, legal process, or to protect rights, safety, security, or prevent misuse.
- If BluArc LLC is involved in a merger, acquisition, financing, reorganization, or sale of assets, subject to appropriate protections.

additionalSections.title: Exports and Sharing
additionalSections.content:
AutoAtlas may let you export vehicle history reports, resale packets, documents, or summaries. You control whether to create and share those exports. Once you share an export with another person or app, their handling of that file is outside AutoAtlas's control.

Review exported reports before sharing them, especially if they include insurance, registration, VIN, license plate, purchase price, receipts, addresses, names, or other personal information.

additionalSections.title: Data Deletion
additionalSections.content:
You can delete records inside AutoAtlas. You can also delete the app from your device. If iCloud sync is enabled, deleted synced records may also be removed from iCloud-connected devices according to Apple's iCloud behavior.

For support communications you sent to us, you may contact us to request deletion where legally required or reasonably possible.

additionalSections.title: Security
additionalSections.content: We use reasonable technical and organizational measures appropriate for an offline-first app. However, no method of storage or transmission is completely secure. You are responsible for protecting access to your device, Apple ID, iCloud account, and exported files.

additionalSections.title: International Users
additionalSections.content: AutoAtlas may be used in locations outside the United States. If you contact us or use Apple services, information may be processed in the United States or other countries according to applicable service provider practices and laws.

terms.acceptance:
These Terms of Service govern your use of AutoAtlas, a vehicle maintenance and document vault app provided by BluArc LLC.

By downloading, accessing, or using AutoAtlas, you agree to these Terms. If you do not agree, do not use the app.
terms.permittedUse:
AutoAtlas helps users organize vehicle maintenance records, mileage, reminders, documents, receipts, warranties, registration information, insurance information, photos, costs, and vehicle history exports.

AutoAtlas is an organizational tool. It is not a mechanic, insurance agent, attorney, tax advisor, registration authority, lender, recall authority, or government agency.

You are responsible for verifying all maintenance needs, legal deadlines, insurance requirements, registration requirements, recall information, warranty terms, resale disclosures, and document accuracy.
terms.purchases:
AutoAtlas may offer Free, Premium, and Pro plans.

The Free plan may include limits such as one vehicle, limited records, limited attachments, local storage, and limited export features.

Premium and Pro plans may unlock additional vehicles, unlimited records, unlimited attachments, resale packet export, iCloud backup and sync, advanced reminders, family/fleet tools, or other paid features.

Paid plans, if offered through the App Store, are processed by Apple as in-app purchases or subscriptions. Prices, trial terms, renewal terms, cancellation rules, refunds, and taxes may be handled by Apple.

Subscriptions renew automatically unless canceled through your Apple ID subscription settings before renewal. Deleting the app does not automatically cancel a subscription.

We may change plan names, features, pricing, or limits in the future. Changes will not reduce features already required by applicable law for an active paid subscription period, but future renewals may be subject to updated terms or pricing where permitted.
terms.userContent:
You are responsible for the information you enter, attach, store, export, or share through AutoAtlas.

You agree not to use AutoAtlas to store or share unlawful, infringing, harmful, fraudulent, or malicious content.

You are responsible for keeping your device, Apple ID, iCloud account, passwords, backups, and exported files secure.
terms.disclaimers:
AutoAtlas is provided "as is" and "as available." To the fullest extent permitted by law, we disclaim all warranties, express or implied, including warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, title, and non-infringement.

We do not warrant that AutoAtlas will prevent missed maintenance, prevent document loss, increase resale value, satisfy legal requirements, or produce complete vehicle records.
terms.limitationOfLiability:
To the fullest extent permitted by law, BluArc LLC and its owners, employees, contractors, and affiliates will not be liable for indirect, incidental, consequential, special, exemplary, or punitive damages, or for lost profits, lost data, lost business, vehicle damage, missed deadlines, failed sales, denied claims, or other losses arising from your use of AutoAtlas.

To the fullest extent permitted by law, our total liability for any claim related to AutoAtlas will not exceed the amount you paid for AutoAtlas in the twelve months before the event giving rise to the claim, or $50 if you paid nothing.

Some jurisdictions do not allow certain limitations, so some of these limits may not apply to you.
terms.termination:
You may stop using AutoAtlas at any time. We may suspend or terminate access to AutoAtlas where reasonably necessary to protect the app, comply with law, prevent misuse, or enforce these Terms.

Sections that by their nature should survive termination will survive, including ownership, disclaimers, limitation of liability, indemnification, and dispute terms.
terms.changes:
We may update these Terms from time to time. If we make material changes, we will update the Last updated date and, when appropriate, provide additional notice in the app or on our website.

Your continued use of AutoAtlas after changes become effective means you accept the updated Terms.

additionalSections.title: Eligibility
additionalSections.content: You must be at least 13 years old to use AutoAtlas. If you use AutoAtlas on behalf of a business, family, fleet, or other organization, you represent that you have authority to do so.

additionalSections.title: Local Storage and iCloud
additionalSections.content:
AutoAtlas is designed to work offline and store data locally on your device unless iCloud sync is enabled.

If iCloud sync is available for your plan and enabled, AutoAtlas may use Apple's iCloud and CloudKit services to sync your records through your private Apple iCloud account. iCloud availability, storage, security, account access, and syncing behavior are provided by Apple and may be subject to Apple's terms, limitations, and outages.

AutoAtlas is not responsible for loss of data caused by device loss, device reset, app deletion, iCloud account issues, Apple service outages, user error, or failure to maintain backups.

additionalSections.title: No Professional Advice
additionalSections.content:
AutoAtlas may display reminders, schedules, cost summaries, mileage logs, resale packets, and vehicle history reports based on data you enter. These features are informational only.

AutoAtlas does not guarantee that maintenance schedules, reminder dates, mileage intervals, cost calculations, resale reports, or document summaries are complete, accurate, or suitable for your specific vehicle.

Always consult your vehicle owner's manual, qualified mechanic, dealer, insurer, lender, registration authority, warranty provider, or other appropriate professional before making decisions.

additionalSections.title: Documents, Attachments, and Exports
additionalSections.content:
AutoAtlas may allow you to attach and preview photos, PDFs, receipts, warranties, insurance documents, registration documents, and other files.

You are responsible for ensuring you have the right to store and share any files you add.

Exports and resale packets are generated from the information and attachments available in the app. You should review exported files carefully before sharing them. AutoAtlas is not responsible for information you choose to omit, include, or share with a buyer, shop, insurer, lender, or other third party.

additionalSections.title: Notifications and Reminders
additionalSections.content:
AutoAtlas may provide local notifications for reminders if you grant permission. Notifications are not guaranteed to be delivered at any particular time and may be affected by device settings, Focus modes, battery settings, operating system behavior, or permission changes.

You remain responsible for meeting maintenance, registration, insurance, inspection, warranty, loan, and other deadlines.

additionalSections.title: Acceptable Use
additionalSections.content:
You agree not to:

- Reverse engineer, modify, or attempt to extract source code except as permitted by law.
- Interfere with the app, Apple services, or other users.
- Use AutoAtlas for illegal, deceptive, or harmful purposes.
- Attempt to bypass plan limits, purchase systems, security features, or access controls.
- Upload or share content you do not have the right to use.

additionalSections.title: Intellectual Property
additionalSections.content:
AutoAtlas, including its name, logo, design, software, text, graphics, and features, is owned by BluArc LLC or its licensors and is protected by intellectual property laws.

You receive a limited, personal, non-exclusive, non-transferable license to use AutoAtlas for its intended purpose, subject to these Terms and Apple's applicable App Store terms.

additionalSections.title: Third-Party Services
additionalSections.content:
AutoAtlas may rely on Apple services such as iOS, SwiftData, iCloud, CloudKit, App Store purchases, notifications, file pickers, photo access, sharing, and device backup. Your use of those services may be governed by Apple's terms and privacy policies.

We are not responsible for third-party services, outages, policy changes, or account restrictions.

additionalSections.title: Updates and Availability
additionalSections.content:
We may update, improve, change, suspend, or discontinue features of AutoAtlas. Some features may require a compatible device, operating system version, iCloud account, subscription plan, or internet connection.

We do not guarantee that AutoAtlas will always be available, uninterrupted, error-free, or compatible with every device or operating system version.

additionalSections.title: Indemnification
additionalSections.content: You agree to defend, indemnify, and hold harmless BluArc LLC from claims, damages, liabilities, costs, and expenses arising from your use of AutoAtlas, your data, your exports, your violation of these Terms, or your violation of another person's rights.

additionalSections.title: Apple App Store Terms
additionalSections.content:
If you downloaded AutoAtlas from the Apple App Store, Apple's terms also apply. Apple is not responsible for AutoAtlas or its content, maintenance, support, warranties, claims, or disputes, except as required by applicable law or Apple's own terms.

Apple and its subsidiaries are third-party beneficiaries of these Terms and may enforce these Terms as they relate to your App Store use of AutoAtlas.

additionalSections.title: Governing Law
additionalSections.content: These Terms are governed by the laws of the State of [INSERT STATE], without regard to conflict of law principles, unless applicable law requires otherwise.

apps.name: QuietWord
apps.description: A King James Version Bible app.
apps.longDescription: QuietWord is a King James Version Bible app built for calm reading, listening, and study.

privacy.informationCollected: QuietWord does not collect personal data from users.
privacy.howInformationIsUsed: Because QuietWord does not collect personal data, no personal information is used for tracking, profiling, or advertising.
privacy.thirdPartyServices: QuietWord may use platform services provided by Apple for app distribution, crash reporting, purchases, or basic device functionality.
privacy.adsAnalyticsDisclosure: QuietWord does not include third-party advertising or analytics SDKs unless this policy is updated to disclose them.
privacy.childrensPrivacy: QuietWord is not intended to knowingly collect personal information from children. If you believe a child has provided personal information, contact us so we can address it.
privacy.updates: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Updates will be posted on this page with a revised effective date.

terms.acceptance: By downloading, accessing, or using QuietWord, you agree to these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, do not use the app.
terms.permittedUse: QuietWord is provided for personal, lawful use. You agree not to misuse the app, interfere with its operation, attempt unauthorized access, or use it in a way that violates applicable laws.
terms.purchases: If QuietWord offers paid downloads, subscriptions, or in-app purchases, those transactions are handled by the applicable app store. Refunds, billing, and cancellation rules are managed by that store's policies.
terms.userContent: If QuietWord allows you to create, save, or share content, you are responsible for that content and for ensuring you have the rights needed to use it.
terms.disclaimers: QuietWord is provided as is and as available. Bible text, reading tools, and related app features are provided for personal reference and are not a substitute for professional advice.
terms.limitationOfLiability: To the maximum extent permitted by law, BluArc, LLC is not liable for indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising from your use of QuietWord.
terms.termination: We may suspend or discontinue access to QuietWord if these terms are violated or if the app is no longer supported.
terms.changes: We may update these Terms of Service from time to time. Updates will be posted on this page with a revised effective date.
